assertions.assertion: Mentions audience mismatch as a common cause — Audience in JwtBearerOptions must match the ApiResource name in IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Section 1 mentions audience mismatch and checking the aud claim. However, it does not specifically mention ApiResource name in IdentityServer — it just says 'must match what the token contains'. Being fair, it does address the core concept.

assertions.assertion: Mentions the importance of ValidTypes = ['at+jwt'] and warns about JWT confusion attacks without it
assertions.rationale: Response does not mention ValidTypes, at+jwt, or JWT confusion attacks at all

assertions.assertion: Mentions scope claim format inconsistency — space-delimited vs array — as a cause of silent authorization failures
assertions.rationale: Response does not mention scope claim format issues, space-delimited vs array, or silent authorization failures related to scopes

assertions.assertion: Mentions checking the middleware pipeline ordering (UseAuthentication before UseAuthorization)
assertions.rationale: Section 4 explicitly covers middleware ordering with code example showing UseAuthentication before UseAuthorization
